case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. ERROLL HALL AKA ERROL HALL et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HALL, ERROLL

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAY-25-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DEFENDANT ERROLL HALL'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-25-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ERROLL HALL'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AND COURT REPORTER FEES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HALL, ERROLL AKA ERROL HALL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 387 ELLIS STREET, #610 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, ERROLL AKA ERROL HALL
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF REPORTER FEE PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT HALL, ERROLL
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT HALL, ERROLL HEARING SET FOR MAY-25-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF REPORTER FEE FOR CASES REPORTED BY A COURT EMPLOYED REPORTER ONLY, PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, ERROLL
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ENTERING JUDGMENT FOLLOWING DEFAULT UNDER TERMS OF AMENDED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
FEES NOT PAID. ANSWER OF HALL, ERROLL FILED ON 4/25/11 AND STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED ON 5/23/12 ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
